title: Charthāwal Heat Wave
lead: Charthāwal is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.00. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Charthāwal has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 16.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40% and the wind speed is 6.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure due to this severe weather condition.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
